realtime_memories.content: When user pastes or cats a prompt file, EXECUTE the workflow immediately. Don't summarize, don't ask. User runs parallel terminals from saved prompts in docs/guides/prompts/.
Plugin/agent token overflow fix: keep global plugins under ~50, agent descriptions under 100 chars, to avoid ~15.9k token context overflow.

Paper 1 polished 0.94->0.97: added 2.7MB ibm_kingston harvest (34 jobs, 156q), updated abstract, corrected NIST caption, verified all 47 citations. 21 pages, zero errors. Submission-ready PoPETs Aug 2026.
Do NOT prompt user for permission when writing project_memory.json during cleanup hooks. Write silently.
CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS=128000 set in ~/.zshrc. Restart Claude Code to pick up. Needed for writing full papers in one shot.
